title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Italian cypress essential oils helps with baldness because it stimulates hair growth and improves scalp health. The oil's active compounds, such as alpha-pinene and beta-caryophyllene, promote blood flow to the scalp, increasing oxygenation and nutrients delivery to the hair follicles. Additionally, its antifungal and antibacterial properties help soothe an itchy scalp and prevent infections that can contribute to baldness.
